prompt: An anime illustration of a confident female wrestler standing in a ring. She has {argument name="hair color" default="blonde"} hair in a high ponytail with a pink bow. She wears a {argument name="outfit color" default="pink"} one-piece leotard with white and gold accents, matching fingerless gloves, and knee-high lace-up boots. She poses with one hand on her hip under bright stadium spotlights, with a blurred audience in the background. A stylized logo in the bottom left reads "{argument name="logo text" default="Sunset Emilia"}". The style features detailed shading and glossy skin highlights.
translatedPrompt: 一张自信的女性摔跤手站在擂台上的动漫插图。她留着 {argument name="hair color" default="金色"} 的高马尾，系着粉色蝴蝶结。她身穿一件 {argument name="outfit color" default="粉色"} 连体紧身衣，配有白色和金色装饰，搭配同色系的露指手套和及膝系带靴。她在明亮的体育场聚光灯下叉腰摆出姿势，背景是模糊的观众。左下角有一个风格化的 Logo，写着“{argument name="logo text" default="Sunset Emilia"}”。画面风格具有细腻的阴影处理和光泽感的皮肤高光。

breakdown.creativeCore: 竞技场中的动漫女性摔跤手：生成一张动漫风格的女性摔跤手插图，她在擂台上摆出姿势，并带有自定义文字 Logo。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
